title: Move Roomba to a new location
shortDescription: Roomba is stuck with one wheel hanging over a cliff or edge
fullDescription: Error 1 on Roomba robot vacuums indicates roomba is stuck with one wheel hanging over a cliff or edge. Roomba communicates errors through voice prompts and indicator lights.

causes.cause: Roomba near a staircase or ledge

symptoms: Roomba returns to dock with error

fixSteps.title: Restart Roomba
fixSteps.instruction: Press and hold the CLEAN button for 10 seconds. Release and press CLEAN again to restart.

fixSteps.title: Inspect the affected area
fixSteps.instruction: Check the area related to this error. Move Roomba to a new location. Remove any visible debris or obstructions.

fixSteps.title: Clean sensors and components
fixSteps.instruction: Wipe all sensors with a clean dry cloth. Clean extractors, wheels, and the dustbin.

fixSteps.title: Factory reset if needed
fixSteps.instruction: If the error persists, perform a factory reset through the iRobot app or by holding CLEAN for 20 seconds.

whenToCallPro: If the error persists after cleaning and resetting, indicating a hardware component failure.
videoSearchQuery: Roomba error 1 move roomba to a new location fix

faq.a: Roomba is stuck with one wheel hanging over a cliff or edge.
Move Roomba to a new location. Clean all sensors and extractors, then restart Roomba.
Most Roomba errors are resolved by cleaning and restarting. Persistent errors may indicate a hardware issue.

fixSteps.instruction: Press and hold the CLEAN button for 10 seconds. Release and press CLEAN again to restart.

fixSteps.title: Inspect the affected area
fixSteps.instruction: Check the area related to this error. Clean Roomba dustbin. Remove any visible debris or obstructions.

fixSteps.title: Clean sensors and components
fixSteps.instruction: Wipe all sensors with a clean dry cloth. Clean extractors, wheels, and the dustbin.

fixSteps.title: Factory reset if needed
fixSteps.instruction: If the error persists, perform a factory reset through the iRobot app or by holding CLEAN for 20 seconds.

whenToCallPro: If the error persists after cleaning and resetting, indicating a hardware component failure.
videoSearchQuery: Roomba error 24 clean roomba dustbin fix

faq.a: The dustbin is full or not properly installed.
Clean Roomba dustbin. Clean all sensors and extractors, then restart Roomba.
Most Roomba errors are resolved by cleaning and restarting. Persistent errors may indicate a hardware issue.

title: Internal error
shortDescription: An internal hardware or software error has occurred
fullDescription: Error 25 on Roomba robot vacuums indicates an internal hardware or software error has occurred. Roomba communicates errors through voice prompts and indicator lights.

title: Vacuum stall

fullDescription: Error 26 on Roomba robot vacuums indicates the vacuum motor has stalled due to a blockage. Roomba communicates errors through voice prompts and indicator lights.
